market_overview.headline: Markets rally on Iran ceasefire hopes while both SPY and QQQ remain in bear rally mode with bullish crossover potential.
market_overview.detail: SPY and QQQ both showing 'Bear Rally above 13W' signals with EMAs near bullish crosses, but 65% of stocks still in bearish structures. BTC deeply oversold at -45.7% from fair value provides contrarian backdrop.

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Technology Leading Momentum Surge
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology dominance continues with semiconductor and optical component stocks posting extreme momentum. Storage and networking hardware showing massive acceleration on AI infrastructure demand.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Minerals vs Technology Services Divergence

strongest.note: Perfect bullish setup with all 14 stocks in bull mode, average 13% above 21W EMA
Materials strength continues with 90% bull participation and strong momentum
Industrial strength with 89% bullish participation and 12.6% average gains

weakest.note: Complete bearish capitulation with all names in downtrends
Consumer spending weakness evident with 80% of names in bear structures
Cloud and software names under pressure despite AI theme - rotation out continues

sector_analysis.detail: Clear energy/materials rotation continues while technology services face selling pressure. Iran ceasefire driving defensive rotation into utilities and staples.

items.text: 217 stocks (72%) still in bearish EMA structures despite market rally - breadth remains poor
Technology services showing -54.8% net score with 77% bear participation - sector leadership breakdown
Fed chair nomination uncertainty with Powell probe creating monetary policy overhang
High volume on several pullback setups (OKE, CME, WM, NOC) suggests potential institutional distribution

news_drivers.headline: What Moved Markets
news_drivers.summary: Wall Street rallied on US-Iran ceasefire developments as geopolitical tensions eased. Energy stocks surged on Middle East stability while defensive sectors attracted flows. Meta's new AI model announcement provided tech sector support amid broader rotation themes.

items.text: US-Iran ceasefire talks drive broad market rally - defensive rotation into energy/utilities
Meta unveils new AI model to justify massive capex spending - tech sector mixed reaction
Fed chair probe uncertainty as Kevin Warsh nomination remains in limbo pending legal process
Banking sector strength on stable rate environment and reduced geopolitical risk
Paramount leadership shakeup as Jeff Shell exits amid SEC violation allegations
